heading: Identify & Drop Unnecessary Indexes
body:
To identify unnecessary indexes in Atlas,
[View Indexes with the Atlas UI](atlas-ui-view-indexes).

Under the **Indexes** tab in Data Explorer, you can view
**Size**, **Usage**, and other information for each of
your indexes. If an index is unused or covered by another index, you
should drop it.

To drop an index in Atlas,
[Drop an Index with the Atlas UI](atlas-ui-drop-an-index).
